Name: Mystery Meat Patty
Notes: Dad's recipe. Nobody knows what's in it. Nobody asks.

Name: Grub Fritters
Notes: Old Marta's suggestion. Embarrassing but people keep ordering it.

Name: Raw Ray Sashimi
Notes: Technically just raw fish. The presentation saves it.

Name: Snarler Stew
Notes: Slow cooked. Regulars start coming back for it.

Name: Drifter Soup
Notes: Gelatinous. Weird. Somehow works. Hunter's recipe.

Name: Pan-Seared Ray
Notes: The upgrade. Same fish, better technique.

Name: Feeder Tartare
Notes: Raw, luminescent, pretentious. Critics approve.

Name: Snarler Roast
Notes: The upgrade from stew. Now it's fine dining.

Name: Drifter Degustación
Notes: Multi-creature dish. First combination recipe.

Name: Leviathan Medallion
Notes: One medallion per Leviathan. Guests book weeks in advance.

Name: Crystal-Glazed Feeder
Notes: Faintly glows. Signature dish. People come from other sectors.

Name: Basic Kitchen
Notes: Tier 1 dishes only.

Name: Proper Kitchen
Notes: Unlocks Tier 2 dishes.

Name: Gourmet Kitchen
Notes: Unlocks Tier 3 dishes.

Name: Legendary Kitchen
Notes: Unlocks Tier 4 dishes.

Name: Cold Storage
Notes: Ingredients survive death.

Name: More Tables
Notes: More customers per cycle.

Name: Neon Sign
Notes: The sign flickers. Still better than nothing.

Name: Shithole Fastfood
Notes: Starting state. Dad's legacy.

Name: Decent Joint
Notes: Locals start talking.

Name: Hidden Gem
Notes: Sector food blogs mention you.

Name: Renowned
Notes: Pilots from other sectors make detours.

Name: Galaxy Famous
Notes: Most famous delicacy in the sector.
